items.title: BBVA and OpenAI collaborate to transform global banking
items.content: BBVA is expanding its work with OpenAI through a multi-year AI transformation program, rolling out ChatGPT Enterprise to all 120,000 employees. Together, the companies will develop AI solutions that enhance customer interactions, streamline operations, and help build an AI-native banking experience.
items.contentSnippet: BBVA is expanding its work with OpenAI through a multi-year AI transformation program, rolling out ChatGPT Enterprise to all 120,000 employees. Together, the companies will develop AI solutions that enhance customer interactions, streamline operations, and help build an AI-native banking experience.
items.summary: 西班牙银行BBVA与OpenAI达成战略合作，启动为期数年的AI转型计划。双方将向12万名员工推广ChatGPT Enterprise，共同开发AI解决方案，旨在提升客户互动、优化运营，并构建面向AI的原生银行体验。

items.title: BNY builds “AI for everyone, everywhere” with OpenAI
items.content: BNY is using OpenAI technology to expand AI adoption enterprise-wide. Through its Eliza platform, 20,000+ employees are building AI agents that enhance efficiency and improve client outcomes.
items.contentSnippet: BNY is using OpenAI technology to expand AI adoption enterprise-wide. Through its Eliza platform, 20,000+ employees are building AI agents that enhance efficiency and improve client outcomes.
items.summary: 花旗集团（BNY）正利用OpenAI技术推动企业范围内的AI应用普及。其Eliza平台已使超2万名员工开发AI代理，以提升工作效率并改善客户成果。

items.title: How We Used Codex to Ship Sora for Android in 28 Days
items.content: OpenAI shipped Sora for Android in 28 days using Codex. AI-assisted planning, translation, and parallel coding workflows helped a nimble team deliver rapid, reliable development.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI shipped Sora for Android in 28 days using Codex. AI-assisted planning, translation, and parallel coding workflows helped a nimble team deliver rapid, reliable development.
items.summary: OpenAI利用Codex在28天内成功将Sora应用发布到安卓平台。通过AI辅助的规划、翻译和并行编码工作流程，敏捷团队实现了快速、可靠的开发。

items.title: Advancing science and math with GPT-5.2
items.content: GPT-5.2 is OpenAI’s strongest model yet for math and science, setting new state-of-the-art results on benchmarks like GPQA Diamond and FrontierMath. This post shows how those gains translate into real research progress, including solving an open theoretical problem and generating reliable mathematical proofs.
items.contentSnippet: GPT-5.2 is OpenAI’s strongest model yet for math and science, setting new state-of-the-art results on benchmarks like GPQA Diamond and FrontierMath. This post shows how those gains translate into real research progress, including solving an open theoretical problem and generating reliable mathematical proofs.
items.summary: GPT-5.2是OpenAI最新推出的数学与科学领域最强模型，在GPQA Diamond和FrontierMath等基准测试中创下新纪录。该模型显著推动了科研进展，成功解决了理论难题并生成了可靠的数学证明，展现了其在科研领域的应用潜力。

items.title: Introducing GPT-5.2
items.content: GPT-5.2 is our most advanced frontier model for everyday professional work, with state-of-the-art reasoning, long-context understanding, coding, and vision. Use it in ChatGPT and the OpenAI API to power faster, more reliable agentic workflows.
items.contentSnippet: GPT-5.2 is our most advanced frontier model for everyday professional work, with state-of-the-art reasoning, long-context understanding, coding, and vision. Use it in ChatGPT and the OpenAI API to power faster, more reliable agentic workflows.
items.summary: GPT-5.2是OpenAI最新推出的专业工作应用模型，具备顶尖的推理、长文本理解、编程和视觉能力。该模型可通过ChatGPT和OpenAI API使用，以实现更快速、可靠的智能工作流程。

items.title: The Walt Disney Company and OpenAI reach landmark agreement to bring beloved characters to Sora
items.content: Disney and OpenAI have reached an agreement to bring more than 200 Disney, Marvel, Pixar and Star Wars characters to Sora for fan-inspired short videos. The agreement emphasizes responsible AI in entertainment and includes Disney’s company-wide use of ChatGPT Enterprise and the OpenAI API.
items.contentSnippet: Disney and OpenAI have reached an agreement to bring more than 200 Disney, Marvel, Pixar and Star Wars characters to Sora for fan-inspired short videos. The agreement emphasizes responsible AI in entertainment and includes Disney’s company-wide use of ChatGPT Enterprise and the OpenAI API.
items.summary: 迪士尼公司与OpenAI达成里程碑协议，将超过200个迪士尼、漫威、皮克斯和星球大战角色引入Sora平台，用于创作粉丝短片。协议强调娱乐领域的负责任AI应用，并涵盖迪士尼公司全面使用ChatGPT Enterprise和OpenAI API。

items.title: Ten years
items.content: OpenAI reflects on ten years of progress, from early research breakthroughs to widely used AI systems that reshaped what’s possible. We share lessons from the past decade and why we remain optimistic about building AGI that benefits all of humanity.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI reflects on ten years of progress, from early research breakthroughs to widely used AI systems that reshaped what’s possible. We share lessons from the past decade and why we remain optimistic about building AGI that benefits all of humanity.
items.summary: OpenAI回顾了十年来的发展历程，从早期研究突破到广泛应用的人工智能系统重塑可能，分享了十年的经验教训，并表达了构建造福全人类的通用人工智能（AGI）的乐观态度。

items.title: Increasing revenue 300% by bringing AI to SMBs
items.content: Discover how Podium used OpenAI’s GPT-5 to build “Jerry,” an AI teammate driving 300% growth and transforming how Main Street businesses serve customers.
items.contentSnippet: Discover how Podium used OpenAI’s GPT-5 to build “Jerry,” an AI teammate driving 300% growth and transforming how Main Street businesses serve customers.
items.summary: Podium利用OpenAI的GPT-5开发了AI助手“Jerry”，帮助中小企业实现营收增长300%，并改变了大街小巷企业的客户服务方式。

items.title: Update to GPT-5 System Card: GPT-5.2
items.content: GPT-5.2 is the latest model family in the GPT-5 series. The comprehensive safety mitigation approach for these models is largely the same as that described in the GPT-5 System Card and GPT-5.1 System Card. Like OpenAI’s other models, the GPT-5.2 models were trained on diverse datasets, including information that is publicly available on the internet, information that we partner with third parties to access, and information that our users or human trainers and researchers provide or generate.
items.contentSnippet: GPT-5.2 is the latest model family in the GPT-5 series. The comprehensive safety mitigation approach for these models is largely the same as that described in the GPT-5 System Card and GPT-5.1 System Card. Like OpenAI’s other models, the GPT-5.2 models were trained on diverse datasets, including information that is publicly available on the internet, information that we partner with third parties to access, and information that our users or human trainers and researchers provide or generate.
items.summary: GPT-5.2是GPT-5系列的最新模型。其安全防护措施与GPT-5和GPT-5.1系统卡描述的基本一致。该模型与其他OpenAI模型类似，训练数据涵盖公开互联网信息、第三方合作数据以及用户或人类训练师提供的内容。

items.title: Strengthening cyber resilience as AI capabilities advance
items.content: OpenAI is investing in stronger safeguards and defensive capabilities as AI models become more powerful in cybersecurity. We explain how we assess risk, limit misuse, and work with the security community to strengthen cyber resilience.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI is investing in stronger safeguards and defensive capabilities as AI models become more powerful in cybersecurity. We explain how we assess risk, limit misuse, and work with the security community to strengthen cyber resilience.
items.summary: OpenAI正投资于更强的安全防护和防御能力，以应对AI模型在网络安全领域的增强。公司阐述了如何评估风险、限制滥用，并与安全社区合作提升网络韧性。

items.title: How Scout24 is building the next generation of real-estate search with AI
items.content: Scout24 has created a GPT-5 powered conversational assistant that reimagines real-estate search, guiding users with clarifying questions, summaries, and tailored listing recommendations.
items.contentSnippet: Scout24 has created a GPT-5 powered conversational assistant that reimagines real-estate search, guiding users with clarifying questions, summaries, and tailored listing recommendations.
items.summary: Scout24利用GPT-5打造了房地产搜索的对话式助手，通过提问、总结和个性化房源推荐，创新搜索体验，提升用户效率。

items.title: OpenAI co-founds Agentic AI Foundation, donates AGENTS.md
items.content: OpenAI co-founds the Agentic AI Foundation under the Linux Foundation and donates AGENTS.md to support open, interoperable standards for safe agentic AI.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI co-founds the Agentic AI Foundation under the Linux Foundation and donates AGENTS.md to support open, interoperable standards for safe agentic AI.
items.summary: OpenAI联合创办了Linux Foundation旗下的Agentic AI Foundation，并捐赠了AGENTS.md文件，旨在支持安全、开放的智能体AI互操作性标准。此举有助于推动该领域的发展。

items.title: Launching our first OpenAI Certifications courses
items.content: Learn how OpenAI’s new certifications and AI Foundations courses help people build real-world AI skills, boost career opportunities, and prepare for the future of work.
items.contentSnippet: Learn how OpenAI’s new certifications and AI Foundations courses help people build real-world AI skills, boost career opportunities, and prepare for the future of work.
items.summary: OpenAI推出首期认证课程，旨在帮助学员掌握实用AI技能，提升职业发展机会，并为未来工作做好准备。这些课程涵盖AI基础知识，助力个人在AI领域发展。

items.title: Bringing powerful AI to millions across Europe with Deutsche Telekom
items.content: OpenAI is collaborating with Deutsche Telekom to bring advanced, multilingual AI experiences to millions of people across Europe. ChatGPT Enterprise will also be deployed to help employees at Deutsche Telekom improve workflows and accelerate innovation.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI is collaborating with Deutsche Telekom to bring advanced, multilingual AI experiences to millions of people across Europe. ChatGPT Enterprise will also be deployed to help employees at Deutsche Telekom improve workflows and accelerate innovation.
items.summary: OpenAI与德国电信合作，将先进的、多语言的AI体验带给欧洲数百万民众。ChatGPT Enterprise将部署于德国电信，以提升员工工作效率，加速创新。此举旨在推动欧洲AI技术的普及和应用。

items.title: Building AI fluency at scale with ChatGPT Enterprise
items.content: Commonwealth Bank of Australia partners with OpenAI to roll out ChatGPT Enterprise to 50,000 employees, building AI fluency at scale to improve customer service and fraud response.
items.contentSnippet: Commonwealth Bank of Australia partners with OpenAI to roll out ChatGPT Enterprise to 50,000 employees, building AI fluency at scale to improve customer service and fraud response.
items.summary: 澳大利亚联邦银行与OpenAI合作，将ChatGPT Enterprise推广至5万名员工，以大规模提升AI应用能力，从而改善客户服务和欺诈应对。此举旨在通过普及AI技能，提高业务效率。

items.title: OpenAI appoints Denise Dresser as Chief Revenue Officer
items.content: Denise Dresser is joining as Chief Revenue Officer, overseeing OpenAI’s global revenue strategy across enterprise and customer success. She will help more businesses put AI to work in their day-to-day operations as OpenAI continues to scale.
items.contentSnippet: Denise Dresser is joining as Chief Revenue Officer, overseeing OpenAI’s global revenue strategy across enterprise and customer success. She will help more businesses put AI to work in their day-to-day operations as OpenAI continues to scale.
items.summary: OpenAI任命Denise Dresser担任首席营收官，负责其全球营收战略，涵盖企业和客户成功领域。她将助力更多企业将AI应用于日常运营，推动OpenAI持续扩张。

items.title: Instacart and OpenAI partner on AI shopping experiences
items.content: OpenAI and Instacart are deepening their longstanding partnership by bringing the first fully integrated grocery shopping and Instant Checkout payment app to ChatGPT.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI and Instacart are deepening their longstanding partnership by bringing the first fully integrated grocery shopping and Instant Checkout payment app to ChatGPT.
items.summary: OpenAI与Instacart深化合作，将首个完全集成的杂货购物和即时结账支付应用引入ChatGPT，提升AI购物体验。

items.title: The state of enterprise AI
items.content: Key findings from OpenAI’s enterprise data show accelerating AI adoption, deeper integration, and measurable productivity gains across industries in 2025.
items.contentSnippet: Key findings from OpenAI’s enterprise data show accelerating AI adoption, deeper integration, and measurable productivity gains across industries in 2025.
items.summary: OpenAI的企业数据显示，2025年AI应用加速普及，实现更深度整合，并带来各行业的可衡量生产效率提升。

items.title: How Virgin Atlantic uses AI to enhance every step of travel
items.content: Virgin Atlantic CFO Oliver Byers shares how the airline is using AI to speed up development, improve decision-making, and elevate customer experience.
items.contentSnippet: Virgin Atlantic CFO Oliver Byers shares how the airline is using AI to speed up development, improve decision-making, and elevate customer experience.
items.summary: 维珍航空首席财务官奥利弗·拜尔斯介绍，该航空公司正利用人工智能加速开发、优化决策并提升客户体验。通过AI技术，维珍航空在旅行各环节实现了效率提升和个性化服务，展现了科技在航空业的应用潜力。

items.title: Introducing OpenAI for Australia
items.content: OpenAI is launching OpenAI for Australia to build sovereign AI infrastructure, upskill more than 1.5 million workers, and accelerate innovation across the country’s growing AI ecosystem.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI is launching OpenAI for Australia to build sovereign AI infrastructure, upskill more than 1.5 million workers, and accelerate innovation across the country’s growing AI ecosystem.
items.summary: OpenAI将在澳大利亚推出“OpenAI for Australia”项目，旨在建设本土化AI基础设施，提升超过150万劳动力的技能，并加速该国日益发展的AI生态系统的创新。

items.title: OpenAI to acquire Neptune
items.content: OpenAI is acquiring Neptune to deepen visibility into model behavior and strengthen the tools researchers use to track experiments and monitor training.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI is acquiring Neptune to deepen visibility into model behavior and strengthen the tools researchers use to track experiments and monitor training.
items.summary: OpenAI宣布收购Neptune，旨在提升对模型行为的洞察力，并强化研究人员追踪实验与监控训练的工具。此举将有助于深化对AI模型运作的理解，优化研究流程。

items.title: How confessions can keep language models honest
items.content: OpenAI researchers are testing “confessions,” a method that trains models to admit when they make mistakes or act undesirably, helping improve AI honesty, transparency, and trust in model outputs.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI researchers are testing “confessions,” a method that trains models to admit when they make mistakes or act undesirably, helping improve AI honesty, transparency, and trust in model outputs.
items.summary: OpenAI研究人员正在测试“坦白”方法，通过训练模型承认错误或不当行为，以提升AI的诚实度、透明度和对模型输出的信任。

items.title: Announcing the initial People-First AI Fund grantees
items.content: The OpenAI Foundation announces the initial recipients of the People-First AI Fund, awarding $40.5M in unrestricted grants to 208 nonprofits supporting community innovation and opportunity.
items.contentSnippet: The OpenAI Foundation announces the initial recipients of the People-First AI Fund, awarding $40.5M in unrestricted grants to 208 nonprofits supporting community innovation and opportunity.
items.summary: OpenAI Foundation宣布首批“以人为本AI基金”获得者，向208个支持社区创新和机会的非营利组织提供总值4050万美元的无限制拨款。

items.title: Inside Mirakl's agentic commerce vision
items.content: Mirakl is redefining commerce through AI agents and ChatGPT Enterprise—achieving faster documentation, smarter customer support, and building toward agent-native commerce with Mirakl Nexus.
items.contentSnippet: Mirakl is redefining commerce through AI agents and ChatGPT Enterprise—achieving faster documentation, smarter customer support, and building toward agent-native commerce with Mirakl Nexus.
items.summary: Mirakl正通过AI代理和ChatGPT Enterprise重塑商业，实现更快的文档处理、智能客服支持，并致力于构建以代理为核心的商业模式，通过Mirakl Nexus推动这一进程。

items.title: Funding grants for new research into AI and mental health
items.content: OpenAI is awarding up to $2 million in grants for research at the intersection of AI and mental health. The program supports projects that study real-world risks, benefits, and applications to improve safety and well-being.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI is awarding up to $2 million in grants for research at the intersection of AI and mental health. The program supports projects that study real-world risks, benefits, and applications to improve safety and well-being.
items.summary: OpenAI将提供高达200万美元的资助，用于人工智能与心理健康交叉领域的研究。该项目支持研究实际风险、益处及应用，旨在提升安全与健康。

items.title: OpenAI and NORAD team up to bring new magic to “NORAD Tracks Santa”
items.content: OpenAI and NORAD are bringing new magic to “NORAD Tracks Santa” with three ChatGPT holiday tools that let families create festive elves, toy coloring pages, and custom Christmas stories.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI and NORAD are bringing new magic to “NORAD Tracks Santa” with three ChatGPT holiday tools that let families create festive elves, toy coloring pages, and custom Christmas stories.
items.summary: OpenAI与NORAD合作，为“NORAD追踪圣诞老人”活动推出三项ChatGPT节日工具，帮助家庭创建节日精灵、设计玩具填色页和定制圣诞故事，为活动增添新趣味。

items.title: OpenAI takes an ownership stake in Thrive Holdings to accelerate enterprise AI adoption
items.content: OpenAI takes an ownership stake in Thrive Holdings to accelerate enterprise AI adoption, embedding frontier research and engineering directly into accounting and IT services to boost speed, accuracy, and efficiency while creating a scalable model for industry-wide transformation.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI takes an ownership stake in Thrive Holdings to accelerate enterprise AI adoption, embedding frontier research and engineering directly into accounting and IT services to boost speed, accuracy, and efficiency while creating a scalable model for industry-wide transformation.
items.summary: OpenAI投资控股公司Thrive Holdings，旨在加速企业人工智能应用。此举将前沿研究与工程嵌入会计和IT服务，提升速度、准确性和效率，并建立可扩展的行业转型模式。

items.title: Accenture and OpenAI accelerate enterprise AI success
items.content: Accenture and OpenAI are collaborating to help enterprises bring agentic AI capabilities into the core of their business and unlock new levels of growth.
items.contentSnippet: Accenture and OpenAI are collaborating to help enterprises bring agentic AI capabilities into the core of their business and unlock new levels of growth.
items.summary: 埃森哲与OpenAI合作，旨在帮助企业将自主AI能力融入核心业务，实现新的增长。此举将加速企业AI的成功应用，推动业务创新与发展。

items.title: Mixpanel security incident: what OpenAI users need to know
items.content: OpenAI shares details about a Mixpanel security incident involving limited API analytics data. No API content, credentials, or payment details were exposed. Learn what happened and how we’re protecting users.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI shares details about a Mixpanel security incident involving limited API analytics data. No API content, credentials, or payment details were exposed. Learn what happened and how we’re protecting users.
items.summary: OpenAI通报了Mixpanel发生的安全事件，涉及少量API分析数据，但未泄露API内容、凭证或支付信息。公司介绍了事件详情及保护措施，用户需了解相关情况。

items.title: Expanding data residency access to business customers worldwide
items.content: OpenAI expands data residency for ChatGPT Enterprise, ChatGPT Edu, and the API Platform, enabling eligible customers to store data at rest in-region.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI expands data residency for ChatGPT Enterprise, ChatGPT Edu, and the API Platform, enabling eligible customers to store data at rest in-region.
items.summary: OpenAI扩展了ChatGPT Enterprise、ChatGPT Edu和API平台的本地数据存储服务，允许符合条件的客户将数据存储在区域内。此举旨在满足全球企业客户的数据驻留需求。
